requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容辐射骚扰——多媒体设备（SANS 55032 / CISPR 32）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容輻射騷擾——多媒體設備（SANS 55032 / CISPR 32）

summary.en: South Africa applies SANS standards aligned with international IEC/CISPR standards for EMC. Wireless and IoT devices must demonstrate compliance with SANS 55032 (aligned with CISPR 32) for radiated and conducted emissions. Testing must be conducted against SANS standards through an accredited laboratory; Chinese GB test reports are not directly accepted. SABS operates the accredited certification and testing infrastructure.
summary.zh: 南非采用与国际IEC/CISPR标准对齐的SANS标准进行电磁兼容管理。无线及物联网设备须证明符合SANS 55032（与CISPR 32对齐）关于辐射和传导骚扰的要求。测试须通过认可实验室依据SANS标准进行；中国GB测试报告不被直接接受。SABS负责认可的认证和测试基础设施。
summary.zht: 南非採用與國際IEC/CISPR標準對齊的SANS標準進行電磁相容管理。無線及物聯網裝置須證明符合SANS 55032（與CISPR 32對齊）關於輻射和傳導騷擾的要求。測試須通過認可實驗室依據SANS標準進行；中國GB測試報告不被直接接受。SABS負責認可的認證和測試基礎設施。

standards_or_laws: SANS 55032 (aligned with CISPR 32) — Multimedia Equipment EMC Emissions
Electronic Communications Act No. 36 of 2005 (South Africa)

summary.en: GB/T 9254 (aligned with CISPR 32) covers radiated and conducted emissions for multimedia equipment in China. GB/T 17625.1 covers harmonic current emissions. Test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories are required domestically. These Chinese national standard test reports are not directly recognised in South Africa.
summary.zh: GB/T 9254（与CISPR 32对齐）涵盖中国多媒体设备的辐射和传导骚扰。GB/T 17625.1涵盖谐波电流骚扰。国内须提供经CNAS认可实验室的测试报告。上述中国国家标准测试报告在南非不被直接承认。
summary.zht: GB/T 9254（與CISPR 32對齊）涵蓋中國多媒體設備的輻射和傳導騷擾。GB/T 17625.1涵蓋諧波電流騷擾。國內須提供經CNAS認可實驗室的測試報告。上述中國國家標準測試報告在南非不被直接承認。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 (China, aligned with CISPR 32) — Radiated and Conducted Emissions

gap.en: New SANS 55032-compliant test reports from an accredited South African or recognised international laboratory are required. Chinese GB/T 9254 test reports from domestic laboratories are not automatically accepted in South Africa.
gap.zh: 须提供经认可的南非或认可国际实验室出具的SANS 55032合规测试报告。国内实验室出具的中国GB/T 9254测试报告在南非不被自动接受。
gap.zht: 須提供經認可的南非或認可國際實驗室出具的SANS 55032合規測試報告。國內實驗室出具的中國GB/T 9254測試報告在南非不被自動接受。

source.publisher: SABS — South African Bureau of Standards

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SANS 55032-compliant EMC emissions testing is required for multimedia and wireless devices sold in South Africa. Chinese GB/T 9254 reports from domestic laboratories are not a direct substitute. New testing against SANS standards through an accredited laboratory is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在南非销售的多媒体和无线设备须进行符合SANS 55032的电磁兼容辐射骚扰测试。国内实验室出具的中国GB/T 9254报告不能直接替代。须通过认可实验室依据SANS标准进行新的测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在南非銷售的多媒體和無線裝置須進行符合SANS 55032的電磁相容輻射騷擾測試。國內實驗室出具的中國GB/T 9254報告不能直接替代。須通過認可實驗室依據SANS標準進行新的測試。

requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容抗扰度——多媒体设备（SANS 55035 / CISPR 35）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容抗擾度——多媒體設備（SANS 55035 / CISPR 35）

summary.en: Wireless and multimedia IoT devices sold in South Africa must meet EMC immunity requirements aligned with SANS 55035 (corresponding to CISPR 35), covering immunity to electrostatic discharge, radiated electromagnetic fields, conducted disturbances, and power-line disturbances. Compliance is required as part of the broader ICASA type approval and SABS assessment process.
summary.zh: 在南非销售的无线及多媒体物联网设备须满足与SANS 55035（对应CISPR 35）对齐的电磁兼容抗扰度要求，涵盖静电放电、辐射电磁场、传导骚扰和电源线骚扰的抗扰度。此要求属于ICASA型式批准和SABS评估程序的组成部分。
summary.zht: 在南非銷售的無線及多媒體物聯網裝置須滿足與SANS 55035（對應CISPR 35）對齊的電磁相容抗擾度要求，涵蓋靜電放電、輻射電磁場、傳導騷擾和電源線騷擾的抗擾度。此要求屬於ICASA型式批准和SABS評估程序的組成部分。

standards_or_laws: SANS 55035 (aligned with CISPR 35) — Multimedia Equipment EMC Immunity
Electronic Communications Act No. 36 of 2005 (South Africa)

summary.en: GB/T 17618 (aligned with CISPR 35) covers EMC immunity for multimedia equipment in China. Domestic testing is conducted through CNAS-accredited laboratories. GB/T 17618 test reports from Chinese laboratories are not directly recognised in South Africa.
summary.zh: GB/T 17618（与CISPR 35对齐）涵盖中国多媒体设备的电磁兼容抗扰度。国内测试通过经CNAS认可的实验室进行。来自中国实验室的GB/T 17618测试报告在南非不被直接认可。
summary.zht: GB/T 17618（與CISPR 35對齊）涵蓋中國多媒體設備的電磁相容抗擾度。國內測試通過經CNAS認可的實驗室進行。來自中國實驗室的GB/T 17618測試報告在南非不被直接認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17618 (China, aligned with CISPR 35) — Multimedia Equipment EMC Immunity

gap.en: Separate SANS 55035-compliant immunity test reports from an accredited laboratory are required for the South Africa market. Chinese GB/T 17618 test reports from domestic laboratories are not automatically accepted.
gap.zh: 南非市场要求提供来自认可实验室的符合SANS 55035的独立抗扰度测试报告。国内实验室出具的中国GB/T 17618测试报告不被自动接受。
gap.zht: 南非市場要求提供來自認可實驗室的符合SANS 55035的獨立抗擾度測試報告。國內實驗室出具的中國GB/T 17618測試報告不被自動接受。

source.publisher: SABS — South African Bureau of Standards

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC immunity testing to SANS 55035 is required for multimedia and wireless devices in South Africa. A separate accredited laboratory test report aligned with SANS/CISPR 35 is needed; Chinese GB/T 17618 reports from domestic laboratories are not a direct substitute.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 南非多媒体和无线设备须进行符合SANS 55035的电磁兼容抗扰度测试。须提供与SANS/CISPR 35对齐的独立认可实验室测试报告；国内实验室出具的中国GB/T 17618报告不能直接替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 南非多媒體和無線裝置須進行符合SANS 55035的電磁相容抗擾度測試。須提供與SANS/CISPR 35對齊的獨立認可實驗室測試報告；國內實驗室出具的中國GB/T 17618報告不能直接替代。
